title: Vattalkundu Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Vattalkundu, with a Z-Score of +4.11. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Vattalkundu is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.4 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 49%, and the wind speed is 0.9 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The lack of wind and high humidity are exacerbating the heat wave's effects, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
